name: Pineapple Upside Down Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat your oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Spray a 9-inch (23 cm) pan with non-stick spray.
3. In the bottom of the pan, mix together the brown sugar, light Karo corn syrup, and lemon juice. Place in the heated oven for 3 minutes.
4. Arrange the pineapple rings in your preferred configuration (e.g., one in each side of the pan, one in the middle, and the remaining two cut in half to place around the corners).
5. Add maraschino cherries to the center of the pineapple rings.
6. In a separate bowl, whisk together sugar and skim milk for 1 minute. Then blend in light Karo corn syrup and vanilla.
7. Stir in flour, corn starch, baking powder, salt, and egg whites until well combined.
8. Pour the batter gently into the pan over the fruit arrangement.
9. Bake for 35-40 minutes. Loosen immediately and invert onto a serving plate.
10. Serve with fat-free frosting if desired.
12 servings
200 calories
0 grams fat
